description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the new input validation step and reordered pipeline flow. Update the Mermaid diagram to show the Validate Input Choice state, the reordered flow (Lambda before Polly), and the validation failure path. Add a section describing the validation logic and supported file formats.
steps: Step 1 - Update the 'Currently Implemented' section in ARCHITECTURE.md to add a row for the 'Validate Input' Choice state describing what it checks (bucket, key presence; file extension validation for .wav, .mp3, .flac, .ogg).

Step 2 - Update the 'Implemented Architecture Diagram' Mermaid flowchart to show the new flow: WriteMetadata -> Validate Input --(valid)--> ProcessAudio -> PollyTask -> UpdateStatus -> NotifySuccess -> Done. Add the validation failure path: Validate Input --(invalid)--> MarkFailed -> NotifyFailure -> PipelineFailed.

Step 3 - Update the 'Orchestration Layer' section to reflect the reordered pipeline states. The new order is: (1) Write Metadata, (2) Validate Input (Choice), (3) Process Audio (Lambda), (4) Synthesize Speech (Polly), (5) Update Status, (6) Notify Success, (7) Done. Update error handling description to include validation failures.

Step 4 - Add a new subsection 'Input Validation' under the Orchestration Layer describing: supported file extensions, required fields (bucket.name, object.key), error behavior (routes to FAILED status and failure notification), and how the Lambda provides additional runtime validation.
Step 5 - Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage' to confirm tests still pass after documentation-only changes.
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram shows Validate Input Choice state in correct position
ARCHITECTURE.md describes the complete end-to-end flow including validation
Mermaid diagram shows both success and failure paths from validation
verification: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage' and confirm all tests pass
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' and confirm it succeeds
findings: Documentation-only change. All 46 tests pass. Updated: Currently Implemented table (added Validate Input row, updated Lambda row), Mermaid diagram (new flow with Choice state), Orchestration Layer states (reordered 1-10), added Input Validation subsection with two-layer validation description.
